title: Sexual and reproductive health - Canada.ca
content:
## Sexual and reproductive health

### Getting tested for STI

Types, benefits, effectiveness, proper use

### How to access gender-affirming care
Types of care, treatment coverage and costs, what Canada’s doing, support and resources, and statistics

### Sexual health and travel
Precautions to take to protect yourself from STIs while travelling abroad

### Financial support for fertility treatment and surrogacy
Tax credits, non-insured health benefits, and support and resources in your province or territory
